name: DITGOLD
description: The digital age has redefined global wealth and power. While gold once stored value and oil powered industry, data has emerged as the most valuable resource of the modern world. DitGold is built on the belief that data is not just “the new oil,” but “the new gold”—a limitless, non-depleting asset that drives innovation, economic growth, and societal progress. Through its decentralized ecosystem and native token DitAu, DitGold recognizes, tokenizes, and democratizes the value of data, enabling transparent ownership, fair participation, and shared prosperity in the data economy.
